Projects

Product Briefs: 0→1 AI Systems
Shipped Product Live

ReceiptIQ

Problem

Extracting data from messy, crumpled receipts is manual and error-prone.

Solution

A vision-to-LLM pipeline that transforms receipt images into structured transaction data.

Outcome

Validated 18 structured transactions and 172 item-level records from 20 receipts.

172 item-level records extracted
View Case Study Live GitHub
Shipped Product Live

PennyPal

Problem

Traditional financial apps lack conversational and intuitive interactions.

Solution

A voice-first GenAI companion that answers financial queries naturally.

Outcome

A voice-first companion that lets users ask financial questions and receive plain-language responses.

View Case Study GitHub
Shipped Product Live

Memora

Problem

Users take thousands of screenshots that become unsearchable clutter.

Solution

An automated extraction tool that indexes screenshots with semantic search.

Outcome

Transforms an unstructured screenshot archive into a semantic knowledge base you can query.

View Case Study Live GitHub
Shipped Product Live

Warmlist

Problem

Tracking high-intent network leads usually falls back to messy spreadsheets.

Solution

A smart CRM that uses AI to score and remind you about warm interactions.

Outcome

Replaces manual lead tracking with an AI-prioritized relationship queue.

View Case Study Live GitHub
System Design Live

SugarShield

Problem

Health-conscious shoppers struggle to judge sugar quality from ingredient lists quickly.

Solution

Rule-based ingredient classifier that detects hidden sugars and artificial sweeteners.

Outcome

Improved recall from 0.31 to 0.77 while maintaining 1.00 precision on 15 food products.

0.77 Recall · 1.00 Precision · 0 False Positives
View Case Study Live GitHub
Product Thinking Prototype

SleepSense

Problem

People take fragmented notes when half-awake that don't translate into action.

Solution

Intelligent parsing system that structures morning-after notes into sleep hygiene trends.

Outcome

Transforms unstructured sleep journal text into structured insights about sleep hygiene.

View Case Study
